reviews.review_description: I like the game just the controllers and hands are under my real life hands please patch this glitch .

developer_response.body:
Hi Remi! Thanks for letting us know, that's definitely not intentional. We would love to help you our with this - please send an email over to us at support@thoughtfish.de or join our Living Room helpdesk channel and open a ticket here: https://discord.gg/Ga2tj8Fubn. 

In the meantime, might be worth resetting the headset as well as resetting your passthrough just in case. Looking forward to helping you fix this!!

reviews.review_description: it looks good i want to play but hard to do when tracking is completely off i feel like i been gipped of my money for a wonky game

developer_response.body:
Hi Panda! Thanks for letting us know - we would love to figure out how to fix this for you. Would you mind sending a video to us by email (support@thoughtfish.de) or our Discord channel (https://www.discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF) so we can take a look at the issue directly? 

Additionally, here are some things you can try:
1. Restart your device - sometimes a quick reboot can fix many issues.
2. Ensure both your device and the game are fully updated to the latest versions.
3. Confirm device compatibility - Living Room is currently supported on Meta Quest 2, 3 and 3S.
4. Delete & redo the Space Setup to ensure your room is properly set up: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/help/quest/463504908043519/ (IMPORTANT: Please ensure the room is well lit, both when redoing the Space Setup and playing the game!)
5. Try starting a new game or loading a different save to see if the issue persists there.
6. If the above steps fail to resolve the issue, please submit a device bug report to Meta by pressing the "Meta" button on your device 5 times and filling out a bug report.
7. Once you have submitted the report, you can also send us your Meta username and we can escalate the issue from our side.

Feel free to reach out to us at any point via Discord or email if you have more questions!

reviews.review_title: I play this with my kid
reviews.review_description: We like it, it's fun to watch him build his islands and take picutres of the colors he's getting. Tutorial gives some structure, but we prefer the Creative mode where we can do everything freely. New features are unlocked in the normal mode(literally its name, a bit funny), there's a lot of things to unlock so that's pretty cool.

developer_response.body: Hi Matthias! Warms our hearts to hear that Living Room is a game you can enjoy with your family 😻 Creative Mode is definitely where the fun is - and there are even more things we have coming in the new year for you to try out. Thank you so so much for your review, and enjoy!!

reviews.review_title: Very fun MR game for kids
reviews.review_description:
Edit 12/24/25: Booted this up again today and the weird bug has been fixed. Whether that was a weird sdk glitch or something idk but updating the review to 5 stars since it remains one of my 6 year olds favorite games.

Original review:

I was pretty disappointed to boot up Living Room and find it completely unplayable on my Meta Quest 3. My son and I have enjoyed this game and were looking forward to trying it out but when we booted it up, the graphics were all squished and warped. The controllers appeared about a foot below where they were supposed to be. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling the game to no avail. The issue seemed isolated to just this game. Other mixed reality games seemed to work just fine so not sure what got borked since we last played.

developer_response.body: Hi Jarom! We're so happy to hear that the issue is now fixed. Please let us know if you have any issues in the future, we're always happy to help however we can. Hope you and your 6 year old continue to enjoy Living Room! 😊

reviews.review_description:
Loving it so far.  Tried it out for a ‘few minutes’ and 2 hours later I realized what had happened.  

I think it could use an update for the Quest 3 graphically, but otherwise I’m loving its cute nature and its sim-lite experience.  The artistic style is spot on though.  Better rez / performance, maybe, but wow, great job so far everyone!  

Sorry, not to nitpick, I can just really see a lot of potential in this one…

developer_response.body: Hi Eric! Thank you so much for your kind words! We're so happy that you're enjoying Living Room, and we've noted your feedback 😊We have a few more updates planned for the coming months, so maybe we can add this on top. Thanks again for your review 😻

reviews.review_description: Awesome game

developer_response.body: Yay!!! So glad you like it, thank you so much for your review 🥳

reviews.review_description: You get back what you put into it. It's really up to you, to keep things going, that's what's fun about it. Plus a virtual pet.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review, TARDIS! Who doesn't love a virtual pet 😇 If there's anything we can do to make Living Room more enjoyable for you, please let us know!! You can contact us any time via email at support@thoughtfish.de or in our Discord https://discord.gg/bWzSMmqeRs 🙌

reviews.review_description:
Great fun
.

developer_response.body: Thank you, Frog! Glad to hear you're enjoying Living Room 😊if there's anything we can do to make the game a better experience for you, please let us know, we're always open for feedback.

reviews.review_description: I wish there were more games with this vibe on the store

developer_response.body: Hi LisaLena - wow thank you so very much for your review. That means the world to us! We're so happy to hear that Living Room is such a nice experience for you. We have more updates coming this year, so keep an eye out. And thanks again!

reviews.review_description: I love the Artstyle and that its mixed reality. As a newbie with VR it kinda takes away the nausea  and lets me experience it without problems. :D

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're so happy to hear that you're enjoying Living Room!! 😻 Thanks so much for your review, it means a lot to us! 😇

reviews.review_description: Good game but very limited variety of gameplay

developer_response.body: Hi Majed! Thanks for your review 😄 Glad you're enjoying Living Room - we've got some super exciting things in the works that we think you'll enjoy if you find the current gameplay variety lacking, so stay tuned!! And thanks again for your review 😊

reviews.review_description: This is the first time we've played a mixed reality game like this - and we love it. It feels super fluffy and you find your way around incredibly quickly. It took my little niece less than 10 minutes and then she was scurrying around the room scattering her pets. We love it!

developer_response.body: YAY! We absolutely love to hear that you and your niece have been enjoying Living Room 😻We wish you lots of fun and many continued adventures with your cute and adorable Living Room pets!

reviews.review_description: It is a great cozy game that is kid friendly but the tutorial is slightly long.

developer_response.body: Hey Wombat! Thanks for your review - we unlocked Creative Mode at Eco Level 5 for this exact reason! We wanted players to get a few pointers on how to play from Normal Mode but once the basics are covered, then Creative Mode is available for you. Hope that helps and we're super glad that you enjoyed your time in Living Room! If there's anything else we can do to make your experience better, please feel free to contact us via email or join our Discord (https://discord.gg/bWzSMmqeRs)!

reviews.review_description:
It takes too long to finish the tutorial of the game- just let me play the darn thing.

I want to play with my daughter but I dont think it allows for shared experiences?

Either way- just let us download, install and make islands. I dont want to have to teach my 6 y/o daughter about resource management.

developer_response.body:
09/05/2025 - Update:
Hey Matbee! Just wanted to let you know that we took your feedback into account, and have updated the game so that Creative Mode is now unlocked from the start of the game. We did this change in part because of your direct feedback, so thank you! However if you really want to learn how to play the game, we recommend following the onboarding tutorial which is accessible through Normal Mode. Otherwise, in Creative Mode, gameplay tips can be accessed by opening the Settings book and clicking "Show Tips". The Settings book can be opened by taking it from the shelf, or by pressing the menu button on the left controller. Please let us know what you think of the update. We hope that this will help change your experience and enjoyment of the game. 😊
---
Hi Matbee! Thanks so much for your feedback - we really appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. We hear you on the tutorial length, and we understand how important it is to be able to jump in and start playing. We're exploring options for a more streamlined onboarding and possibly including a parent bypass mode, and we'll keep you updated if and when that becomes available. 😊 If you'd be willing to help us improve the onboarding, please feel welcome to join our Discord (https://www.discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF) and share your ideas! As for shared experiences, it's a request we've heard from others as well. While it's a more technically complex addition, it's definitely on our radar for future planning. Thanks again for your input, it helps us shape the direction of the game and we are grateful for it!

reviews.review_description: I was intrigued with this one, and enjoyed it enough when I was about 20 minutes in... but I'd started in too small of a room, so I need to try again. My kid, however, had a go (in a large room) and loved it, and came back for more. I enjoyed experiencing it with him by casting to the TV. There's a few not so logical control issues and conflicts of a lot of stuff going on in the room, combined with things not lining up with the room scan, but it's not ruining it at all. Recommended.

developer_response.body:
Hi Michael. Thanks so much for sharing your feedback! We're glad to hear you and your family are enjoying Living Room. We're very curious about what you mean about "things not lining up with the room scan" -- this sounds like it could be a device issue. Would you mind sending a video or description to us by email (support@thoughtfish.de) or our Discord channel (https://www.discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF) so we can help diagnose the issue? We'd also love to hear more about your ideas for controls - perhaps it's something we can address in a future update. In the meantime you can also try the following troubleshooting steps to resolve the room scan issue:

1. Restart your device - sometimes a quick reboot can fix many issues.
2. Ensure both your device and the game are fully updated to the latest versions.
3. Confirm device compatibility - Living Room is currently supported on Meta Quest 2, 3 and 3S.
4. Delete & redo the Space Setup to ensure your room is properly set up: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/help/quest/463504908043519/ (Please ensure the room is well lit, both when redoing the Space Setup and playing the game!)
5. Try starting a new game or loading a different save to see if the issue persists there.

Please let us know if any of these manage to solve the issue. We look forward to hearing from you and thank you again for your helpful feedback!

reviews.review_description: This is a very interesting & unique mixed reality title.  There are a few minor movement glitches & stutters (hence the 4 of 5 stars), but I'm confident the devs will continue to improve that.  I enjoyed this reasonably-priced sandbox experience & would recommend this game as a good mixed reality experience.  I can see younger people really enjoying this as well, as there is plenty of creative interaction & projects to complete.

developer_response.body: Hi Scooter thanks for your review!! We'd love to hear more about the glitches and stutters so we can send them over to our team to review. If you could send us an email at support@thoughtfish.de or join our Discord (https://discord.gg/Ga2tj8Fubn) and submit a ticket to our Living Room helpdesk that would be a great help in narrowing down where the issue(s) occur. We're so happy to hear that you're enjoying your time in Living Room! 😊 Thanks again!

reviews.review_description:
As an adult that has to live alone in a no pet policy (not even a goldfish) apartment. This is the solution to everything and it's absolutely amazing! I just played this for a day and I'm already in love with it.

This game is absolutely genius and the animations make you feel like you're actually interacting with these lil guys.

Please never stop developing and improving this game. This is possibly one of the greatest pet games ever. If you're a pet lover like me or just love cute things I definitely recommend. ❤️

developer_response.body: 🥰🥰🥰 Ohhh that's so kind of you! We're really glad our derpy lil' pets are being good company. Our whole team was touched by your review. We are happy to keep making games as long as people like you continue enjoying them! 🤗 Wishing you lots of fun in Living Room!

reviews.review_description: Can't move the island things

developer_response.body:
30/04/2025 -Follow up 2: Hi Jack! We'd be grateful if you could send us a video of the issue via email or Discord at the address provided in our previous message. Please let us know if any of the troubleshooting steps helped. We'd really like to be able to help you diagnose this issue and get back to enjoying Living Room! :) ---

17/04/2025 - Follow up 1:

Hi again, Jack! Just following up on your feedback about not being able to move the islands in the game. We’d love to know - have you had a chance to try any of the troubleshooting steps we shared? If these steps do not resolve the issue, the issue might be related to your device or setup. We’d really appreciate an update. If the problem’s still happening, feel free to reach out to us directly at support@thoughtfish.de or hop into our Discord (https://www.discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF) - our team’s happy to help troubleshoot further with you one-on-one.  A video of the issue would be extremely helpful to aiding us in determining whether it's a game issue or device issue. Thanks! We look forward to hearing from you. :)

---

10/04/2025 - Troubleshooting steps:

Hi Jack, thanks for your feedback. We're sorry to hear that you're having trouble moving the islands. We'd love to help you get things working as intended!

Normally, when you hover your controller around the edges of/slightly into the island, you should see repositioning handles pop up which you can grab to adjust your island - both horizontally and vertically. If for some reason you can't reach the sides of the island, there is a "Return Islands and Room Decorations to Books" button inside the Settings Book that allows you to position your islands from the Island Book after.

If this does not work, there may be an issue with the device setup or controls. Here are a few steps to try:

1. Check the controls you are using to move. Make sure you're using the grip buttons when trying to move objects. If you're unsure of the controls, check the in-game tutorial or Settings menu for control layout.

2. Try restarting your device - sometimes a quick reboot can fix controller sync or tracking issues.

3. Ensure both your device and the game are fully updated to the latest versions.

4. Check the Space Setup to ensure your boundary is properly set up and your controllers are fully visible to the tracking sensors: https://www.meta.com/en-gb/help/quest/463504908043519/

5. Try starting a new game or loading a different save to see if the issue persists there.

If none of that helps, we'd be happy to look into it further! Just reach out to us at support@thoughtfish.de or join our Discord (https://www.discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF) for  live support.

reviews.review_title: This game is the cutest game ever
reviews.review_description:
The animals are so cute and￼
￼and funny to look at

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We hope they bring you joy! 🐆🐘🦍

reviews.review_description:
Allows you to save up to 4 different games. Great for a family of 4.  It’s fun to set up the ecosystems and to see what comes up next. The mixed reality gives you no boundary so you can go around and set up your biomes.

5star!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review. Happy to hear that you and your family are having fun! :)

reviews.review_description: This is easy chilled play, very cute and so much fun to grow and develop your own little world, full of little adorable creatures.  The game is going to be long lived with lots of playing hours and has several different play modes to extend its playability.  Also there are many options to creatively design and build the world you want around the comfort of your  own room.  The controls and gameplay are both intuitive and work well together.  This is definitely one to get, well done Devs.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review. Our team really appreciate your kind words. We wish you lots of fun with our game!

reviews.review_description:
I played this game with my 8-year-old daughter, and she absolutely loves it! I found it fun and even a bit addictive at times. The creatures are adorable, and the breeding feature sparked some interesting questions from my daughter about how babies are created…

I’d rate it 5 stars if it weren’t for a few bugs. For example, when I place a new animal on an island and turn away to look at the bookcase, the animals sometimes disappear when I turn back.

Also, I noticed that the lions are represented only as males (with manes), so when breeding, it shows two males having a baby, which led to some confusing questions from my daughter about the “mommy lion.” It would be great if a lioness was paired with the lion, even if it means slightly increasing the cost.

I haven’t progressed too far yet, but it’d be cool if there was an option to merge islands or build bridges between those with the same theme.

Finally, when elevating the landscape, it’d be nice if animals could walk on it. Right now, it just takes up valuable space that animals can’t access.

Overall, it’s great fun with tons of potential. Adding DLC packs or a dedicated pet mode, similar to Dotti, could make it a standout game with loads of replayability.

This game is so lighthearted and cozy I could spend hours just watching my derpy animals walk around and play with my pet Pudding ❤️
But as soon as I discovered the decorations I was lost to creating my perfect cozy space. 

I cannot recommend this enough to just have a great time for whatever time you want to play it!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your lovely review! We are thrilled to hear you're enjoying the cozy vibes and adorable animal antics. Your kind words mean the world to us. We hope you and Pudding continue to have fun in Living Room!

reviews.review_title: One Of The BEST MR Games Out There
reviews.review_description:
It's like the developers asked themselves, "how much can we pack in mixed reality?" and then just added EVERYTHING. 

-3-4 islands to hold all your adorably derpy animals (you can put multiple biomes on one island)
-Pick an animal to enlarge and it WALKS AROUND YOUR ROOM! You can tell it to dig certain spots which will net you in game currency or more paint for your islands. 
-Room decorations: Unlock room decorations for completing certain in game quests like rugs, plushies, art pieces. 
-Day/night cycle you can toggle for certain animals (and your ceiling actually shows an adorable "sky"
-Feel like an animal god, behold all your creations

There are 3 different modes, campaign in which you follow an addictive and helpful quest line to unlock all the animals/biomes etc, challenge mode where the quests become more specific scenarios to complete, and sandbox. There is so much to this "game" that before long, my rooms start looking more virtual than real (but I like it that way!)

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words!! We are thrilled you are loving Living Room as much as we loved creating it. Knowing people see and enjoy all of those adorable derpy details means the world to us, and your support and feedback keep us inspired to add more magic. Let us know what you think we should try next! Thank you for coming on this adventure with us. :)

reviews.review_description: Just a super cozy and chill game with some surprising depth 😁🙌🏾 We need more games like this on the platform !

developer_response.body: Thanks! We're really excited about the dynamic range of possibilities that mixed reality has in store and like to think Living Room occupies a special space, between obviously cute & cozy, and deceptively challenging. :D

reviews.review_description: It’s amazing how my furniture transforms into little islands full of adorable animals and cozy habitats. The whole experience feels so alive, with animals that even have unique color variants as they breed! I love being able to decorate every corner making the whole setup feel like a cozy mini sanctuary. Having a life-sized animal companion by my side is just the best <3

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words and detailed review. Glad to hear you are enjoying Living Room! We'd love to see how you decorate -- feel welcome to join our Discord to share pics! http://discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF

reviews.review_title: Ppl Need help how to remove pet
reviews.review_description: Awesome game

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review :) We are glad that you enjoy the game.

Regarding your question, you can exchange your pet anytime, by just putting another animal into the pet-machine. Once you created a pet, exchanging it is the only option. Please feel free to join our discord, for more info and support on the game: http://discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF

reviews.review_description: Exactly what you need in this times. Something that puts you off dark thoughts and lightens youre mind to face reality again. Would not mind to make this a full day job to tender to these cute creatures and habitats the whole day!

developer_response.body: Thank you for you nice review. We are glad the game brings you joy -- knowing our derpy animals brighten your day means a lot to us! We hope you have fun playing with your pets!

reviews.review_description: The game is great over all but when I want to go up and down the stairs I have to grab everything and take a lot of trips up and down

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! Inside the Settings book on your bookshelf, there is a "Return Islands and Room Decorations to Books" button. By clicking this button, then you would only need to take the Bookshelf and Questboard with you :) Give this a try, and if it helps please feel free to update your review! If you need more support or have any questions, you are welcome to join our Discord: http://discord.gg/az7bCEF8NF

reviews.review_description:
I really love the derpy animals :D It's also fun to breed them to get fancy colors.
I always wanted to have a tiny ecosystem like this!

developer_response.body: All of the pets, none of the mess! If only real life had fancy pink penguins, too... then real life would be as cool as Living Room!

reviews.review_description: OMG! My sheep got stuck in the floor and I had to rescue it 😂 The game is absolutely adorable, fun, chill, super derp and my apartment is now soooo much nicer than in real life.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, it gave us a good laugh. We hope your sheep is OK!! We're glad to hear that you’re enjoying the Living Room vibes. If only we could find a way to make the decorations persist outside of VR... how cool would it be to have a night sky at bedtime?!

reviews.review_description: Any game with animal breeding mechanics is a good game.

developer_response.body: Thanks! Living Room was developed by people who love animal management games, virtual pets and breeding sims, so it's great that it's finding its way to others who enjoy the genre. :) Good luck keeping your animals alive to unlock those wacky colors! It's more challenging than it looks. ;)

reviews.review_description: So cute, I love animals!

developer_response.body: Thanks very much for your kind words. Have fun in Living Room!

reviews.review_title: Found the perfect mode for me!
reviews.review_description:
As someone who likes a challenge, the challenge mode is perfect!
I started playing the game but the normal mode was too easy for me.
But then I unlocked the challenge mode and since them I am hooked!

developer_response.body: Glad to hear you're enjoying Living Room and having fun with the challenges! Some sure LOOK easy, but looks can be deceiving. ;) We've had a lot of positive feedback about the challenges and hope to include more in the future, so stay tuned for more updates! :)

reviews.review_description:
An absolutely delightful game. Colourful and fun with the sweetest little animals everywhere. QwQ
This was my first MR experience and I loved every minute of it. I could barely tear myself away even after playing for hours.
Highly recommended to anyone who loves a cozy game with just the right amount of depth. 
Also did I mention you can have oen of those critters as a pet? YOU CAN HAVE A PET!

developer_response.body: We’re so happy to hear you enjoyed your first MR experience with us! Being able to have an adorably derpy pet is definitely one of the best parts. Our latest update also introduces a new fetch mechanic so there are even more ways to interact with your pet! Thanks so much for recommending us -- we’re thrilled you had such a cozy adventure in Living Room!

reviews.review_title: Great for VR beginner (and pet lovers)
reviews.review_description: I absoultely love having my little gorilla pet around!! Overall, I feel like this was a great introduction to VR gaming. The controls felt intuitive even if I am quite new to playing VR games. I didnt need much time to get used to it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your enthusiastic review! We are glad you found Living Room to be a great introduction to VR gaming and easy to get into. Welcome to the magical world of mixed reality -- we wish you heaps of fun with it! Stay tuned for our updates and upcoming titles for even more cozy and exciting VR experiences. :)

reviews.review_description: I can have a personal zoo at home without the need for going outside, thats great! Even breeding and a ecosystem simulation is in that game. Love it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We're glad you're having a cozy time creating wildlife wonderlands. :)

reviews.review_description: now the official version is finally released. It’s better than ever. It would be great if the menus and items could support multiple languages, such as Chinese. Thank you!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! Our game is currently available in 6 languages (EN, FR, DE, ES, KO, JP), but we are working on expanding this soon, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Let the cuteness cure your worries!
reviews.review_description:
The game is one of the best ways to bring your stress levels down . Especially after work I just like to relax a bit and see what is going on with my islands and see my pet gorilla walking around my bedroom being adorably derpy.
Can't recommend this game enough!

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing those kind words! We're happy to hear you are enjoying our game and find it relaxing. We wish you and your pet gorilla continued fun in Living Room! P.S. Have you tried playing fetch yet?

reviews.review_title: 46 yo and I honestly like it!!!
reviews.review_description: It’s a relaxing sim. Good stuff!!!

developer_response.body: Play knows no age, fun is for everyone! Thank you for your kind review - we are glad to hear you are enjoying Living Room and hope to bring more fun to you! :)
